# Wedding Gallery Images

## How to Add Your Photos

1. Add your wedding photos to this folder
2. Name them as: `photo-1.jpg`, `photo-2.jpg`, `photo-3.jpg`, etc.
3. Supported formats: `.jpg`, `.jpeg`, `.png`, `.webp`
4. Recommended size: 1200x1200 pixels (square format)
5. The gallery currently displays 9 photos (photo-1.jpg through photo-9.jpg)

## Tips for Best Results

- Use high-quality images
- Compress images to keep file size reasonable (< 500KB per image)
- Square format works best for the gallery grid
- Photos will automatically display in the gallery once added

## Example File Names

```
photo-1.jpg
photo-2.jpg
photo-3.jpg
photo-4.jpg
photo-5.jpg
photo-6.jpg
photo-7.jpg
photo-8.jpg
photo-9.jpg
```

If an image is missing, a placeholder with a heart icon will be shown instead.
